complaintDesc:
Train No 12715 has just departed from Nanded and the condition of the H1 and A1 coaches is disgusting and disgraceful The toilets are filthy unhygienic and completely unfit for passengers who are paying premium AC fares
  
  Do the officials responsible for inspections ever check these coaches or are reports being signed without even looking at the actual condition Would any officer tolerate such toilets in their own office or home for even a single day If the answer is no then why are passengers expected to travel in these conditions
  
  The state of these coaches reflects gross negligence lack of accountability and complete disregard for passenger comfort and hygiene Passengers are charged premium fares but are being provided facilities that resemble a neglected public facility rather than a premium railway coach
feedbackRemark: Your reply & service received within micro second, which is highly appreciated by 0 star rating
remarks: The complaint pertains to the poor housekeeping and unhygienic condition of the toilets in H1 and A1 coaches of Train No. 12715. The matter has been viewed seriously and forwarded to the concerned officials for immediate corrective action. The onboard housekeeping staff has been instructed to attend the coaches promptly, and the issue will also be addressed during the next scheduled maintenance at the maintenance depot. Necessary instructions have been issued to ensure proper inspection and monitoring to prevent recurrence of such lapses.
